visits.note: Patient presents with 2-year history of Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, and Hyperlipidemia. Initial HbA1c 7.2, BP 140/90, eGFR 72. Medications: Metformin 500mg daily, Lisinopril 5mg daily, Atorvastatin 20mg daily. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia. Symptoms: Fatigue, Polyphagia, Polyuria.

Follow-up visit 6 months after initial visit. Patient reports improved symptoms but HbA1c 7.8 and BP 145/95. eGFR 68. Medications adjusted: Metformin to 1000mg daily, Lisinopril to 10mg daily. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia. New diagnoses: Nephropathy. Symptoms: Fatigue, Polyphagia, Polyuria, Edema.

Patient presents with worsening symptoms and lab values. HbA1c 8.2, BP 155/100, eGFR 60. Medications adjusted: Metformin to 1500mg daily, Lisinopril to 20mg daily, Atorvastatin to 40mg daily. New diagnoses: Coronary Artery Disease. Symptoms: Fatigue, Polyphagia, Polyuria, Edema, Chest pain.

Patient reports improved symptoms after medication adjustments. HbA1c 7.5, BP 130/85, eGFR 65. Medications adjusted: Metformin to 2000mg daily, Lisinopril to 30mg daily. New diagnoses: Chronic Kidney Disease stage 3. Symptoms: Fatigue, Polyphagia, Polyuria, Edema, Chest pain.

Patient presents with stable lab values and symptoms. HbA1c 6.8, BP 125/80, eGFR 70. Medications adjusted: Metformin to 2500mg daily, Lisinopril to 40mg daily. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Nephropathy, Coronary Artery Disease, Chronic Kidney Disease. Symptoms: Fatigue, Polyphagia, Polyuria, Edema, Chest pain.
